name: hearth-monorepo
description: Hearth — an open-source, agent-native 2D game engine and editor

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:editor
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @hearth/core && npm run build -w @hearth/runtime && npm run build -w @hearth/playtest && npm run build -w @hearth/cli && npm run build -w @hearth/mcp-server
